_doc: Hand-labeled ground truth for 'template example/Black and white template.pptx'. Per slide, shape_ids that are genuine fillable content slots: TEXT (title, headings, body, brand/presenter/date) and IMAGE (photos framed as picture-filled groups, e.g. slide 2 shape 5, slide 3 shape 15). Decoration = freeforms, non-image groups, dividers, off-slide bleeds, and sequence-number micro-boxes. Labels established by visually inspecting LibreOffice-rendered previews of slides 0-3.
